ariaSpec.usage: The root div element of the OrgChart. Contains all its top level items.
Specifies the orientation of the OrgChart tree.
The element that wraps child nodes.
The element that groups nodes visually with a title and expand/collapse button.
The node container must not break the tree-treeitem relationship.
The node wrapper representing the treeitem in the hierarchical structure.
Announces the level of the tree node item. The value of level is number-based (>=1).
Announces that the edit menu of the OrgChart can be activated via the Enter key.
Present when a node has subitems. Announces the expanded state of the node.
Present when a node has subitems. The value is the id of the group containing child nodes.
Announces the selected (focused) item in the OrgChart.
Announces the not selected (focused) items in the OrgChart.
Describes the avatar image of an item.
Specifies the menu icon of the item is a button.
Provides an accessible name for the edit button.
The Edit menu button must not be part of the page tab sequence.
Hides the button from assistive technology.
The expand/collapse button must not be part of the page tab sequence.
